## Scope note

<!--
Please keep v1 non-goals in mind. Goodman v1 detects and alerts on drift; it
does NOT enforce or block. Requests to add inline enforcement, blocking, or
sandboxing are out of scope for v1 — but describing the detection/alerting need
behind such a request is very welcome.
-->
